title: Indian Fairy Tales
author: Joseph Jacobs
description: "Indian Fairy Tales," compiled by Joseph Jacobs, is a captivating anthology that brings together a diverse array of traditional stories from India. These tales, rich in cultural heritage and folklore, offer a glimpse into the vibrant storytelling traditions of the Indian subcontinent. The collection includes a variety of narratives, from moral fables to enchanting fairy tales, each imbued with evolving characters and imaginative plots.
